church.name: The Faith Centre Global
church.tagline: A Word of Faith, Prophetic, and Apostolic Church
church.description: The Faith Centre Global (TFCG) is a Word of Faith, Prophetic, and Apostolic church based in Lagos, Nigeria, committed to raising kingdom champions through the undiluted Word of God.

pastor.name: Pastor Godspower Opara Martins
pastor.title: Lead Pastor
pastor.bio: Pastor Godspower Opara Martins is an anointed teacher of the Word, operating heavily in the prophetic and apostolic offices. His ministry is characterized by deep scriptural insight, accurate prophetic declarations, and notable miracles.

location.address: 48 Funsho Kinoshi Street, Off Okiki by Jemtok, Bustop Ago Palace Way, Okota Lagos, Nigeria

ministries.name: Youth Ministry
ministries.description: Empowering the next generation with the Word of Faith and raising young leaders.

ministries.name: Worship Ministry
ministries.description: Ushering the congregation into the presence of God through spirit-filled worship.

ministries.name: Prayer Ministry
ministries.description: Dedicated intercessors standing in the gap for the church, the nation, and individuals.

ministries.name: Outreach Ministry
ministries.description: Taking the gospel beyond the four walls of the church to communities and the unsaved.

ministries.name: Children Ministry
ministries.description: Building strong faith foundations early in a fun, safe, and engaging environment.

ministries.name: Women Ministry
ministries.description: Empowering women to fulfill their God-given potential as wives, mothers, and leaders.

giving.note: Online payment integration is coming soon. For now, giving can be made via bank transfer or in person during service.

books.purchaseNote: Books can be purchased by contacting the church directly on WhatsApp.

livestream.note: Services are streamed live every Sunday and Wednesday. If the stream shows offline, check the service schedule.

faq.answer: Our service times are Sunday First Service at 8:00 AM, Sunday Second Service at 10:30 AM, and Wednesday Bible Study at 6:00 PM, all in West Africa Time.
We are located at 48 Funsho Kinoshi Street, Off Okiki by Jemtok, Bustop Ago Palace Way, Okota Lagos, Nigeria.
Our Lead Pastor is Pastor Godspower Opara Martins, an anointed teacher of the Word operating in the prophetic and apostolic offices.
You can give through tithes, offerings, or special seeds via bank transfer. Online payment options are coming soon.
Visit our Books page to browse titles by Pastor Godspower Opara Martins. You can purchase directly through WhatsApp.
You can watch our services live on YouTube. If we are not currently broadcasting, you can watch recent messages on demand.
You can submit a prayer request through our Contact page, and our intercessory team will stand in faith with you.
We have several ministries including Youth, Worship, Prayer, Outreach, Children, and Women Ministry. Every member is a minister.
You can reach us at tfcglobal48@gmail.com or call/WhatsApp 0812 345 6901.
We host weekly services and special events such as our Annual Faith Conference and Youth Summit throughout the year.
Our sermon library features messages from Pastor Godspower Opara Martins on faith, the prophetic, and apostolic living.
The Faith Centre Global is a Word of Faith, Prophetic, and Apostolic church committed to raising kingdom champions who walk in dominion and purpose.

greeting: Peace be with you. I am the TFCG Ministry Assistant. I can help you with service times, location, giving, books, livestream, prayer requests, ministries, and more. How may I assist you today?
fallback: I do not have a specific answer for that yet. For further assistance, please contact us directly at tfcglobal48@gmail.com or 0812 345 6901.
